lootTables.name: Normal Belt Loot - Small Hulls
lootTables.description: Rule-backed low-tier loot for ordinary asteroid belt frigate and destroyer rats. Empty wrecks are possible but uncommon; faction/deadspace/officer items are excluded by runtime selectors.

lootTables.name: Normal Belt Loot - Medium Hulls
lootTables.description: Rule-backed low-tier loot for ordinary asteroid belt cruiser and battlecruiser rats. Empty wrecks are possible but uncommon; faction/deadspace/officer items are excluded by runtime selectors.

lootTables.name: Normal Belt Loot - Large Hulls
lootTables.description: Rule-backed low-tier loot for ordinary asteroid belt battleship rats. Empty wrecks are possible but uncommon; faction/deadspace/officer items are excluded by runtime selectors.

lootTables.name: Angel Belt Commander Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed faction-grade loot for Angel Cartel asteroid commander rats. Uses Domination modules and charges instead of normal belt loot.

lootTables.name: Blood Raider Belt Commander Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed faction-grade loot for Blood Raider asteroid commander rats. Uses Dark Blood modules and charges instead of normal belt loot.

lootTables.name: Guristas Belt Commander Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed faction-grade loot for Guristas asteroid commander rats. Uses Dread Guristas modules and charges instead of normal belt loot.

lootTables.name: Sansha Belt Commander Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed faction-grade loot for Sansha asteroid commander rats. Uses True Sansha modules and charges instead of normal belt loot.

lootTables.name: Serpentis Belt Commander Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed faction-grade loot for Serpentis asteroid commander rats. Uses Shadow charges and Shadow Serpentis modules instead of normal belt loot.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Belt Normal Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed component, salvage, and alloy loot for ordinary asteroid Rogue Drone rats. This avoids pirate weapon and ammo pools.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Deadspace and Commander Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed component, salvage, and alloy loot for Rogue Drone deadspace and sentient commander rats.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Officer Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed high-grade component and salvage loot for rare Rogue Drone officer units.

lootTables.name: Pirate Asteroid Hauler Cargo
lootTables.description: Rule-backed cargo-style loot for major pirate asteroid haulers. Uses minerals, ore, and light industrial filler rather than combat modules.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Asteroid Hauler Cargo
lootTables.description: Rule-backed cargo-style loot for Rogue Drone asteroid haulers. Uses drone components, salvage, and drone alloy/refinable material instead of pirate cargo.

lootTables.name: Pirate Hauler Pending Loot
lootTables.description: Explicitly empty placeholder for sourced pirate asteroid hauler NPC entities until cargo and loot parity are modeled separately.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Standard Pending Loot (Deprecated Compatibility Empty Rule)
lootTables.description: Deprecated compatibility row retained only so old Rogue Drone references do not fall back to random-any loot. Active Rogue Drone profiles use loot_rogue_drone_belt_normal, loot_rogue_drone_deadspace, or loot_rogue_drone_officer.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Deadspace Pending Loot (Deprecated Compatibility Empty Rule)
lootTables.description: Deprecated compatibility row retained only so old Rogue Drone references do not fall back to random-any loot. Active Rogue Drone profiles use loot_rogue_drone_belt_normal, loot_rogue_drone_deadspace, or loot_rogue_drone_officer.

lootTables.name: Rogue Drone Officer Pending Loot (Deprecated Compatibility Empty Rule)
lootTables.description: Deprecated compatibility row retained only so old Rogue Drone references do not fall back to random-any loot. Active Rogue Drone profiles use loot_rogue_drone_belt_normal, loot_rogue_drone_deadspace, or loot_rogue_drone_officer.

lootTables.name: Blood Raiders Standard Loot (Deprecated Compatibility Empty Rule)
lootTables.description: Deprecated compatibility row retained only so old references do not fall back to random-any loot. Active normal belt profiles use loot_belt_normal_small, loot_belt_normal_medium, or loot_belt_normal_large.

lootTables.name: Blood Raider Deadspace Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed deadspace loot for Blood Raider Deadspace NPCs. Uses faction ammo/trash as common filler and Corp deadspace modules as uncommon rewards.

lootTables.name: Blood Raider Officer Loot
lootTables.description: Rule-backed officer loot for Blood Raider Officer profiles. Officer-name module pools are the defining reward, with faction ammo, faction modules, and Corp deadspace modules as fallback flavor.
